prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约7501→6949→7217→6850→6404，整体呈波动前移趋势，近3年累计前移约813名；2025年基准约6404名，为近年最高水平。 本省物理类计划2021年234人、2022年229人、2023年241人、2024年244人、2025年242人；2026年计划256人，较2025年扩招14人（+5.8%），扩招幅度较 大，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第37名，近年排名稳定在35–37名区间，属顶尖211行列；2025年声誉偏正面（投档线稳 步提升、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率升至27%）；2026年有实验室爆炸负面事件，但整体关注度一般；抖音热度排名第61（一般），短视频曝光量中等；航空宇航科学与技术A-、力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、控制科学与工程A-、软件工程A-、信息与通信工程A-，7个A类学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电 子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等核心工科专业社会热度高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约31.3万人（按总考生45.1万×历史比例估算），较2025年32.1万略降约 2.4%，竞争压力略有减轻；南京航空航天大学位于江苏南京，与安徽地理相邻，对安徽考生吸引力较强；该校在安徽招生规模较 大（物理类约240+人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年扩招14人（+5.8%）、考生总数略降、声誉总体正面但存在负面事件，在202 5年基准6404名基础上，扩招效应使位次后移，但考生数略降和学校热度上升形成对冲；预测最低位次约6656名，区间6156–7156名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）

- 电子信息类（拔尖创新班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6156–7156名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<6156名）可重点冲击长空创新班和拔尖创新班；位次接近区 间上限（>7156名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入南航平台。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7501 → 6949 → 7217 → 6850 → 6404, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 813 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 6404, the highest level in recent years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 234 in 2021, 229 in 2022, 241 in 2023, 244 in 2024, and 242 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 256, an increase of 14 students (+5.8%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 37th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities; the 2025 reputation is generally positive (steadily increasing admission scores, selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, postgraduate recommendation rate rising to 27%); in 2026, there was a negative incident involving a laboratory explosion, but overall attention is moderate; Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), with moderate short video exposure; Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A-, Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, 7 A-level disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are highly popular and recommended; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 313,000 (estimated based on total candidates of 451,000 × historical ratio), a slight decrease of about 2.4% from 325,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, geographically adjacent to Anhui, with strong appeal to Anhui candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Anhui (about 240+ in Physics Category), making it a key provincial source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 expansion of 14 students (+5.8%), a slight decrease in total candidates, generally positive reputation but with negative incidents, based on the 2025 baseline of 6404, the expansion effect will shift the ranking backward, but the slight decrease in candidates and increased school popularity will offset each other; the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 6656, with a range of 6156–7156.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Top-notch Innovation Class)
- Electronic Information (Top-notch Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation
- Artificial Intelligence
- Aerospace
- Software Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Internet of Things Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6156–7156, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<6156), you can focus on aiming for the Chang Kong Innovation Class and Top-notch Innovation Classes; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>7156), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and strive to enter the NUAA platform.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2025年声誉偏正面（投档线稳步提升）；2026年有实验室爆 炸负面事件但主要影响理工科；抖音热度一般；该校以工科为主，文科专业（法学、会计学、英语等）无A类学科评估，但依托学校整体211平台，文科专业仍具 一定竞争力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1772 → 2081 → 2145 → 2392 → 2382, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 610 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2382; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 27 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 36 in 2024, and 34 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 19, a significant reduction of 15 places (-44.1%) compared to 2025, indicating a drastic enrollment cut and intensified competition. 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 37th, belonging to top-tier 211, still strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2025, the reputation is relatively positive (steadily increasing admission scores); in 2026, there is a negative incident of a laboratory explosion, but it mainly affects science and engineering; Douyin popularity is average; the university is primarily engineering-oriented, with liberal arts majors (Law, Accounting, English, etc.) having no A-class discipline evaluations, but relying on the overall 211 platform, liberal arts majors still have certain competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has divided social heat and is in a wait-and-see state; Accounting/Finance/Financial Management is recommended; Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and in a wait-and-see state; the number of History Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 138,000 (estimated based on total candidates 451,000 × history proportion), a slight decrease of about 2.4% from 141,400 in 2025; Nanjing is geographically adjacent to Anhui, making it strongly attractive to Anhui liberal arts candidates; but the History Category enrollment scale is extremely small (19 people), leading to fierce competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 44.1% drastic reduction in the 2026 History Category plan, and a slight decrease in total candidates, the reduction effect is absolutely dominant, so the ranking should significantly move forward (the number decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 1721, with a range of 1411–2031.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1411–2031, with only 19 History Category enrollments, competition is extremely fierce. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1411), you can focus on sprinting for Law and Accounting; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2031), you need to apply cautiously and consider pairing with other schools as a safety net.
